title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: lightweight, extensible framework for running LLMs locally with a built-in model library and REST API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-community/llms/ollama
summary: First-class LangChain integration; use any Ollama model as an LLM or chat endpoint with memory, tools, agents, etc.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Full-featured, self-hosted ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama; markdown, code highlighting, multi-user, RAG.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Minimal SvelteKit UI for chatting with Ollama; single-file Docker deployment, no database required.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; fluent API, streaming, embeddings, custom timeouts, Android compatible.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed, async wrappers over the Ollama REST API with Tokio.

title: OllamaKit
summary: Swift package for macOS/iOS apps; async/await wrappers, Combine publishers, Codable models.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community CLI with interactive REPL, conversation history, syntax highlighting, and shell completions.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker images (CPU & GPU) plus compose stacks for one-command local LLM servers.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for Ollama + WebUI on Kubernetes with GPU node-selector and autoscaling.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns Ollama models into inline GitHub Copilot-like assistant; fully local.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin for code generation, explanation, and refactoring using any Ollama model via Lua API.

title: ollama-emacs
summary: Emacs package with transient menus for chat, completion, and embeddings inside any buffer.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Ready-to-run RAG pipeline using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + Streamlit; PDF ingestion included.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that streams Ollama responses in threads; slash commands, model switching, per-guild config.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app for chatting with Ollama models in channels/DMs; supports threads and ephemeral messages.
